affected_controls: Tornado REST API endpoints, session tokens, and route parameters validation
validation_required: Run complete pytests: `pytest tests/test_api.py -v`
Execute staging browser smoke checks to confirm all back-office and client portal routes return status 200
Verify Tornado server loads correctly under production environment configuration parameters
plain_english_impact: The central server containing all API routes and handlers. Changes here can break any onboarding or back-office route across the entire platform.

affected_controls: PII encryption and password complexity policy
validation_required: Run targeted tests: `pytest tests/test_approval_gate.py -v` and `pytest tests/test_security_hardening_extended.py -v`
Verify that an unverified or flagged application fails to pass the approval gate (fail-closed check)
plain_english_impact: Enforces all P0 and P1 security controls (password hashing, PII encryption, approval gate validation). Breaking changes here directly expose the platform to data breaches and regulatory failure.

validation_required: Run tests: `pytest tests/test_rule_engine.py -v` and `pytest tests/test_risk_scoring.py -v`
Verify that changing sector or country on an application successfully recalculates risk composites
plain_english_impact: Translates corporate structures, PEP details, and sectors into mathematical risk weights and scores (Low to Very High). Errors directly bypass regulated approval requirements.

affected_controls: Sumsub API client and error handling
validation_required: Run targeted tests: `pytest tests/test_sumsub_verification.py -v` and `pytest tests/test_sumsub_integrity_hardening.py -v`
Verify webhook signatures are authenticated correctly in the staging provider environment
plain_english_impact: The client that handles live interactions with the external KYC provider (Sumsub). Outages or errors here block client onboarding and AML screening.

affected_controls: Anthropic Claude API client, prompt injection defense, and response cache
validation_required: Run tests: `pytest tests/test_agent_executors_wave1.py -v`
Verify prompt sanitization logic blocks injected script elements safely without hanging
plain_english_impact: The interface communicating with the Anthropic Claude API. Faults here completely disable compliance memo generation, agent validation, and supervisor contradiction checks.

validation_required: Run targeted tests: `pytest tests/test_memo_original_risk_level.py -v` and `pytest tests/test_memo_staleness_approval.py -v`
Verify memo generation blocks if sanctions screening is pending or risk scoring is uncomputed
plain_english_impact: Compiles all database and screening findings into a structured, audit-ready compliance memo. This is the primary commercial and operational module of the system.

validation_required: Run tests: `pytest tests/test_validation_engine.py -v`
Verify validation results are persisted correctly inside the compliance_memos table
plain_english_impact: Audits compliance memos against 15 specific rules to calculate quality scores. Flags missing facts or contradictory decisions before human officer sign-off.

validation_required: Run tests: `pytest tests/test_supervisor.py -v` and `pytest tests/test_supervisor_warnings_approval.py -v`
Confirm that a mismatch between risk level and approval decision blocks application sign-off
plain_english_impact: Cross-references automated AI checks against raw database findings. Ensures the AI and the database tell the exact same story.

affected_controls: PostgreSQL connection pooling, raw SQL query formatting, and transaction commit hooks
validation_required: Run tests: `pytest tests/test_infra_db_compat.py -v` and `pytest tests/test_migration_chain_full.py -v`
Confirm database transactions rollback safely on server-side query crashes
plain_english_impact: Controls all database connections and transaction routing. Errors here crash the entire application and risk severe database corruption.

affected_controls: Bcrypt password hashing and JWT token signature generation
validation_required: Run tests: `pytest tests/test_auth.py -v` and `pytest tests/test_auth_stability.py -v`
Confirm invalid or expired JWT tokens fail with status 401 (Unauthorized) across all routes
plain_english_impact: Governs platform user logins, registration hashes, and JWT token signatures. A bug here allows authentication bypass.

affected_controls: Materiality classification workflows, atomic database profiles, and change request validation
validation_required: Run targeted tests: `pytest tests/test_change_management.py -v` and `pytest tests/test_cm_implement_propagation.py -v`
Verify Tier 1 structural changes successfully trigger risk recomputation and memo staleness flags
plain_english_impact: Tracks and validates changes to company structures or sectors post-onboarding. Enforces profile versioning and triggers compliance updates.

affected_controls: Automated document check routing, expiration dates parsing, and OCR processing
validation_required: Run tests: `pytest tests/test_verification_matrix.py -v` and `pytest tests/test_document_health_monitor.py -v`
Confirm file hash validations block direct duplicates on upload
plain_english_impact: Extracts document details and schedules verification checks. Errors here bypass document expiration or liveness requirements.

affected_controls: Verification check classifications (RULE, HYBRID, AI), triggers, and scoring metrics
validation_required: Run tests: `pytest tests/test_verification_matrix.py -v`
Verify that changing the verification status of a document propagates correctly through the dashboard UI
plain_english_impact: Houses the rules matrix for document validity checks. Represents essential codified compliance expertise.

affected_controls: Risk-driven scheduling frequency (e.g. 1 year vs 3 months), priority scores, and review lifecycles
validation_required: Run tests: `pytest tests/test_periodic_review_engine.py -v`
Verify periodic review records update correctly in the database when a manual schedule button is clicked
plain_english_impact: Manages review frequencies and alerts compliance officers when periodic checks are due. Inactive automation leaves this as a manual task.

affected_controls: Structured JSON log format and logging utilities
validation_required: Run tests: `pytest tests/test_observability.py -v`
Verify standard error logs emit as clean, single-line JSON fields
plain_english_impact: Provides structured logging for telemetry. Errors here break staging log aggregation but do not affect compliance decisions directly.

affected_controls: Back-office dashboard UI, officer login, and role switcher buttons
validation_required: Execute browser smoke tests: login as officer, view screening queue, and generate a memo
Verify UI displays validation warning markers correctly for flagged documents
plain_english_impact: The central user interface used by compliance officers to review cases. Visual errors can lead to bad compliance decisions.

affected_controls: Onboarding portal UI, client login, and S3 file upload forms
validation_required: Execute browser smoke tests: register new client, submit application, upload S3 file
Verify frontend validations successfully block invalid corporate structure uploads
plain_english_impact: The applicant-facing portal. Errors here block new users from submitting their onboarding documentation, halting onboarding pipelines.
